mapper.sql: id, name, contact, phone, city, address, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_supplier WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.sql: o.order_no as orderNo, o.fault_type_id as faultTypeId, ft.name as faultTypeName, u.nickname, u.phone, o.address, o.latitude, o.longitude, o.remark, o.status, o.create_time as createTime, o.update_time as updateTime, o.cancel_time as cancelTime, o.supplier_id as supplierId, o.user_id as userId, o.evaluate_status as evaluateStatus, s.name as supplierName, s.contact as supplierContact, s.phone as supplierPhone, st.name as staffName, st.phone as staffPhone, st.skill as staffSkill
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_fault_type ft ON o.fault_type_id = ft.id LEFT JOIN t_supplier s ON o.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_order_staff os ON o.order_no = os.order_no LEFT JOIN t_staff st ON os.staff_id = st.id WHERE o.supplier_id = #{supplierId} OR o.supplier_id IS NULL OR o.supplier_id = '' ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT , e.content as content FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_fault_type ft ON o.fault_type_id = ft.id LEFT JOIN t_supplier s ON o.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_order_staff os ON o.order_no = os.order_no LEFT JOIN t_staff st ON os.staff_id = st.id LEFT JOIN t_order_evaluate e ON o.order_no = e.order_no COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET supplier_id = #{supplierId}, status = 'processing', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE t_order SET status = 'completed', update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_no as orderNo, o.fault_type_id as faultTypeId, ft.name as faultTypeName, o.address, o.status, o.create_time as createTime FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_fault_type ft ON o.fault_type_id = ft.id WHERE o.status = 'pending' AND (o.supplier_id IS NULL OR o.supplier_id = '') ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ft.name as faultTypeName, COUNT(o.order_no) as count FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_fault_type ft ON o.fault_type_id = ft.id WHERE o.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY ft.name

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, '%m-%d') as orderDate, COUNT(o.order_no) as count FROM t_order o WHERE o.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND o.status = 'completed' AND o.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY orderDate ASC
